skill.body:
# Role-Based Access Control
## Overview This skill covers the design and administration of role-based access control (RBAC) within the asset management system, ensuring users interact only with data relevant to their responsibilities.
## Defined Roles
### Admin - Full system access across all departments - Manage user accounts and role assignments - Access audit logs and system configuration - Perform bulk operations and system exports
### Manager - Department-level oversight of assets - Approve asset requests from users - Access department-scoped reports and analytics - Manage assignments within their department
### User - View and manage assets within their own department - Submit new asset requests - View personal assignment records
## Key Responsibilities - Assign roles to users based on job function - Review and audit role assignments periodically - Enforce least-privilege principles across all access levels - Manage access changes during onboarding and offboarding
## Related Entities - User roles, Department, AuditLog
skill.description: Ability to configure and manage role-based access control for an asset management system, covering Admin, Manager, and User roles with appropriate permission boundaries.
skill.name: Role-Based Access Control
